description:
The Nextcloud Desktop Client is a tool to synchronize files from Nextcloud Server with your computer.

Use the desktop clients to keep your files synchronized between your Nextcloud server and your desktop.
Select one or more directories on your local machine and always have access to your latest files wherever you are.
What's Changed
- [stable-4.0] fix(whiteIcons): fix state icons for white monochrome theme by @backportbot[bot] in nextcloud/desktop#9391
- [stable-4.0] fix(AppImage): bundle less libraries to improve compatibility by @backportbot[bot] in nextcloud/desktop#9388
- [stable-4.0] fix(activitydata): use parameter validation regex from server by @backportbot[bot] in nextcloud/desktop#9415
- [stable-4.0] fix: use branded user agent for Flow v2 login request by @backportbot[bot] in nextcloud/desktop#9447
- [stable-4.0] fix(utility): allow creation of fav links with paths containing spaces by @backportbot[bot] in nextcloud/desktop#9465
- [stable-4.0] fix(win32): only increase ACL size if a new ACE is about to be added by @backportbot[bot] in nextcloud/desktop#9531
- [stable-4.0] feat(syncengine): fail and restart the sync if discovery is suspicious by @backportbot[bot] in nextcloud/desktop#9574
- chore: update openssl version by @mgallien in nextcloud/desktop#9575
- [stable-4.0] fix(accountmanager): check existing account proxy type setting. by @backportbot[bot] in nextcloud/desktop#9576
- [stable-4.0] Improve error handling and clean menu texts by @backportbot[bot] in nextcloud/desktop#9587
Full Changelog: nextcloud/desktop@v4.0.6...v4.0.7
